heading: ## Append-only store disciplines
reason: Realized by work-item livespec-impl-plaintext-lhq: the supersedes field, the sha256 per-record identity, the order-independent supersession-chain-head reduction, and the .gitattributes '*.jsonl merge=union' entry. The mapped test pins order independence; the sibling reduction tests in test_store.py cover tie-breaks, divergence surfacing, and identical-line collapse. The two store-integrity checks (no-divergent-heads, no-raw-store-read) remain follow-up work-items.
